title: Winso Bykart

{{Quote|Qui-Gon and I tracked a Jedi named Winso Bykart. It was our second trip to Ragoon-6.|Obi-Wan Kenobi|<ref name="TTJ" />}}
'''Winso Bykart''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]<ref name="TTJ" /> around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="DateJQ">According to ''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'', [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] had their second trip to [[Ragoon VI|Ragoon-6]] with Winso Bykart shortly before their [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|mission to Naboo]], which took place in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Bykart was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who often ferried [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] pairs to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ragoon VI|Ragoon-6]] for a traditional field [[Jedi training/Legends|exercise]], where Bykart would go into hiding and the pair would try to track down their fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="TTJ" /> Around 32 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="DateJQ" /> one of these pairs were Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his apprentice [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Kenobi would later reflect on his [[Time/Legends|time]] on Ragoon-6 with Bykart while on a trip to the planet with his own learner, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]],<ref name="TTJ" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'', including [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] trip to [[Ragoon VI|Ragoon-6]], to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Winso Bykart was first mentioned in ''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'', a young-readers novel written by [[Jude Watson]] and published in [[2002]].<ref name="TTJ" />
